command.help.mc:
/mcstatus [Server:Port] - Query Minecraft server status (auto-detect Java/Bedrock)
Inline: @NachoNekoX_bot mc [Server:Port]
command.help.mcje:
/mcje [Server:Port] - Query Minecraft Java server status
Inline: @NachoNekoX_bot mcje [Server:Port]
command.help.mcbe:
/mcbe [Server:Port] - Query Minecraft Bedrock server status
Inline: @NachoNekoX_bot mcbe [Server:Port]
prompt.server_address_required:
Please provide a server address in this format: /mc server:port
Example: /mc mc.hypixel.net
inline.usage_text:
Please provide server address
Usage: mc [server:port] (auto) or mcje/mcbe [server:port] (specific edition)
